name: Python + Hugging Face
postCreateCommand: python -m venv ${workspaceFolder}/.venv && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m ipykernel install --user --name venv-kernel --display-name 'Python (.venv)'
